name: B3TR Transit
desc: B3TR Transit is a "Ride-to-Earn" dApp designed to address urban pollution and congestion by incentivizing public transportation usage. Powered by VeChain and integrated with VeBetterDAO (VBD), B3TR Transit rewards users with $B3TR tokens for every verifiable eco-commute. By gamifying sustainability and making environmental action financially rewarding, B3TR Transit aims to transform daily travel habits and foster a greener future.

name: Non-Fungible Book Club Marketplace
desc: The NFBC marketplace for trading and collecting audiobooks you truly own.

name: Solarwise Marketplace
desc: Solarwise SolarNFT Marketplace. SolarWise Own The Sun AG leads the ReFi movement, offering Solar NFTs that represent full ownership of solar panels.

name: StarGate Marketplace
desc: Discover and trade Stargate Node NFTs on the secondary market. Buy, sell, and collect VeChain-powered staking nodes backed by staked VET and VTHO rewards.

name: ReUse
desc: Verify secondhand clothing purchases via the VeChain blockchain and reward users with B3TR tokens for climate-positive actions.

name: Redeno
desc: Redeno is the first and leading liquid staking token service on VeChain.

name: BlackVeMarket
desc: Discover Limitless NFT Experiences with BlackVeMarket: Where the VeFam Unites! Join our Vibrant Community and Explore the Boundless World of Digital Collectibles, Trading, and Creativity. Embrace the Future of NFTs and Unleash Your Imagination with BlackVeMarket!

name: WoV Marketplace
desc: The first gas-free, green NFT platform built on the VeChain blockchain

name: VeSea Marketplace
